'''鈭歡-n-z-j''' ('''kaganzejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twank|twank]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twank|twank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-n-z-j
|-
! Lemma
| kaganzejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiganzejoko|thiganzejoko]] || [[word:jiganzejoko|jiganzejoko]] || [[word:shiganzejoko|shiganzejoko]] || [[word:kiganzejoko|kiganzejoko]]
